title: Easy Plesiosaurus Coloring Page

seoDescription: Download and print this simple Plesiosaurus swimming in water. Perfect for young children. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Fossils of Plesiosaurus were first discovered by the legendary paleontologist Mary Anning in England in 1823.
Plesiosaurus was a prehistoric marine reptile with a broad body, short tail, and four powerful flippers used to fly through the water.
